translation: n. 天主教徒
v. 离弃，丢弃；遗弃，抛弃；放弃
example: How could she abandon her own child? 她怎么能抛弃自己的孩子？

translation: n. 腹，下腹(胸部到腿部的部分)
example: He went into the hospital to undergo tests for a pain in his abdomen. 他去了医院接受对他的腹部疼痛进行的各项检查。

translation: v. 忍受，容忍；停留；遵守
example: I can’t abide that man – he’s so self-satisfied. 我受不了那个人，他太自满了。

translation: n. 能力， 智能；
example: The test measures your mathematical ability. 这种测试考查的是数学能力。

translation: adj. 反常的， 不正常的
example: abnormal behaviour 反常行为

translation: adv. 在飞机上；[船] 在船上；在火车上；prep. 在…上
example: The plane crashed, killing all 200 people aboard. 飞机失事，机上200人全部遇难。

translation: v. 废除，废止；取消，革除
example: Slavery was abolished in the US in the 19th century. 美国于19世纪废除了奴隶制。

translation: v. 富于；充满
example: Stories abound about when he was in charge. 他负责时传闻很多。

translation: adv. 在国外；到海外；adj. 往国外的；n. 海外；异国
example: I’ve never lived abroad before. 我以前从未在国外生活过。

translation: adj. 生硬的；突然的；唐突的；陡峭的
example: an abrupt change of plan 计划的突然改变

translation: n. 缺乏，不存在；缺席，不在；缺席的时间
example: In the absence of any evidence, the police had to let Myers go. 警察没有证据，只好把迈尔斯放了。

translation: adj. 缺席的；缺乏的,不存在的;心不在焉的
example: The dull, absent look on her face implied boredom. 她脸上呆滞、茫然的神情说明她觉得无聊了。

translation: adj. 绝对的，完全的；确实的，肯定的
example: I have absolute confidence in her. 我对她充满信心。

translation: v. 吸收；吸引；承受；理解；使…全神贯注
example: Plants absorb nutrients from the soil. 植物从土壤中吸收养分。

translation: adj. 抽象的；n. 摘要，梗概；v. 提取；摘录要点
example: By the age of seven, children are capable of thinking in abstract terms . 儿童到了七岁就具有抽象思维的能力。

translation: adj. 荒谬的；可笑的；n. 荒诞；荒诞作品
example: It seems an absurd idea. 这似乎是个荒唐的想法。

translation: n. 充裕，丰富
example: This area of Mexico has an abundance of safe beaches and a pleasing climate. 墨西哥的这个地区有大量的安全沙滩与宜人的气候。

translation: adj. 丰富的；充裕的；盛产
example: an abundant supply of fresh water 充足的淡水供应

translation: vt. 滥用；虐待；谩骂；n. 滥用；虐待
example: Williams abused his position as Mayor to give jobs to his friends. 威廉斯滥用市长权力，给不少朋友安排了工作。

translation: adj. 学术的；理论的；学院的；n. 大学生，大学教师；学者
example: He possessed no academic qualifications. 他没有学历。

translation: n. 学院；研究院；学会；专科院校
example: the American Academy of Arts and Letters 美国艺术和文学学会

translation: v. 使加速，使增速，促进；v. 加快，增加
example: measures to accelerate the rate of economic growth 加快经济增长速度的措施

translation: n. 口音；重音；强调；特点；重音符号；v. 强调；重读；带…口音讲话
example: He had a strong Irish accent 他有浓重的爱尔兰口音。

translation: v. 接受，领受；认可，同意；v. 同意，认可
example: Rick accepted her offer of coffee. 她请里克喝咖啡，他接受了。

translation: n. 接受，接收，验收，接纳；承认，认可
example: He wrote a letter of acceptance (=  a letter in which you agree to accept a job, university place etc  ) to the university. 他给那所大学写了一封接受函。

translation: n. 进入；接入；到达；享用权；入口；v. 存取
example: Access is by means of a small door on the right. 入口是右边的一扇小门。

translation: n. 附件,附属品;(全套衣服增加美感的)服饰
example: bathroom accessories such as mirrors and towel-rails 镜子和毛巾架等浴室配件

translation: n. 意外遭遇,事故；意外(因素)
example: Ken had an accident at work and had to go to hospital. 肯在工作中出了事故，不得不去医院。

translation: adj. 偶然的；意外的；无意中的
example: an accidental discharge of toxic waste 有毒废料的意外排放

translation: v. 称赞；为…喝彩，向…欢呼；n. 欢呼，喝彩；称赞
example: His work was acclaimed by art critics. 他的作品得到艺术评论家的推崇。

translation: v. 向…提供住处；对...予以照顾性考虑
example: The island was used to accommodate child refugees. 该岛用于收容儿童难民。

translation: n. 住宿，留宿；膳宿供应
example: The government will provide temporary accommodation for up to three thousand homeless people. 政府将为多达三千无家可归的人提供临时住所。

translation: v. 陪伴，陪同；伴随，一起发生，伴奏
example: Children under 14 must be accompanied by an adult. 14岁以下儿童必须有成人陪同。

translation: v. 完成；实现；达到
example: We have accomplished all we set out to do. 所有计划要做的事情，我们都已完成。

translation: vi. 相符合， 相一致；n. 一致， 符合；协议， 条约；vt. 授予， 赠与
example: The punishments accorded with the current code of discipline. 处罚与现行的纪律规则一致。

translation: n. 一致；和谐
example: IT organizations working in an environment with compliance requirements must to be able to document that they have designed, implemented, and tested the application in accordance with these standards. 工作在有法规遵循要求的环境中的IT组织必须能够证明他们已经计划、执行，并测试了这个应用软件与这些标准是保持一致的。

translation: adv. 因此，于是；相应地；照著
example: Katherine still considered him a child and treated him accordingly. 凯瑟琳仍旧把他当作小孩子，像对待小孩子一样对他。

translation: adj. 叙述，说明；账目，账户；v. 说明，解释
example: His account contradicted itself. 他的解释自相矛盾。

translation: n. 会计人员，会计师
example: The boss dropped an accountant from the payroll. 老板把一名会计师从在职人员名单中除了名。

translation: v. 累积；积聚
example: It is unjust that a privileged few should continue to accumulate wealth. 少数特权阶级继续积聚财富，这是不公平的。

translation: n. 准确（性）；精确；准确度
example: He passes the ball with unerring accuracy. 他传球准确无误。

translation: adj. 正确无误的；准确的，精确的
example: The brochure tries to give a fair and accurate description of each hotel. 该手册尽量公正、准确地介绍每一家酒店。

translation: v. 控告，指控；谴责；归咎于
example: The professor stands accused of (=  has been accused of  ) stealing his student’s ideas and publishing them. 那位教授被指控剽窃学生的观点拿去发表。

translation: vt. 使习惯于<
example: She tried to accustom herself to the tight bandages. 她尝试着使自己习惯那些紧绷的绷带。

translation: adj. 惯常的；习惯的，适应的(一般作表语)
example: The pans were in their accustomed places. 那些锅在老地方。

translation: v. 疼痛；渴望；n. 疼痛
example: His feet were aching from standing so long. 他站了那么久，双脚隐隐作痛。

translation: v. 取得；获得；实现；成功
example: Frances achieved very good exam results. 弗朗西丝考试取得了优异成绩。

translation: n. 酸,酸性物质a.酸的,酸味的；尖刻的
example: sulphuric acid 硫酸

translation: v. 承认；答谢；报偿；告知已收到
example: The family acknowledge the need for change. 全家人都承认需要改变一下。

translation: v. 使熟悉；使认识
example: I need to acquaint myself with the new regulations. 我得熟悉一下新的规章制度。

translation: n. 熟人；相识；了解；知道
example: She was a casual acquaintance of my family in Vienna. 她是我们家在维也纳的一个交情不深的朋友。

translation: v. 获得；取得；学到；捕获
example: Manning hoped to acquire valuable works of art as cheaply as possible. 曼宁希望以尽可能低的价格买到有价值的艺术品。

translation: n. 获得物，获得；收购
example: the acquisition of language 语言的习得

translation: n. 英亩；田地；地产
example: They own 200 acres of farmland. 他们拥有200英亩农田。

translation: n. 特技演员，杂技演员
example: The acrobat balanced himself on the high rope. 杂技演员在高绳上保持平衡。

translation: v. 表演；举动；起作用；n. 行为，法令；一幕
example: They acted unreasonably when they turned down Jill’s application. 他们拒绝了吉尔的申请，这样做没道理。

translation: n. 行动，动作；作用；运转；行为；战斗
example: The government must take action (=  do something  ) now to stop the rise in violent crime. 政府现在必须采取行动遏止暴力犯罪的上升。

translation: v. 启动，激活；驱动，驱使；使开始起作用
example: Cooking fumes may activate the alarm. 烹调时的油烟可能会触发警报器。

translation: adj. 活跃的，敏捷的，积极的；在活动中的
example: games for active youngsters 活跃好动的年轻人玩的游戏

translation: n. 活动；活性； 活力
example: Everyone is free to engage in peaceful political activity. 每个人都可以自由参加和平的政治活动。

translation: n. 男演员；行动者；作用物
example: His father was an actor in the Cantonese Opera Company. 他父亲曾是粤剧团的一名演员。

translation: n. 女演员
example: She's not only a great dramatic actress but she's also very funny. 她不仅是一位伟大的女戏剧演员，而且也很幽默。

translation: adj. 实际的；现实的，真实的，目前的
example: I’m not joking. Those were his actual words. 我没开玩笑，那都是他的原话。

translation: adj. 严重的，[医] 急性的；敏锐的；激烈的；尖声的
example: The housing shortage is more acute than first thought. 住房短缺情况比一开始想的要严重。

translation: v. 使适应；改编
example: The ability to adapt is a definite asset in this job. 适应能力是做这份工作的绝对有利条件。

translation: v. 使沉溺；使上瘾；n. 沉溺于不良嗜好的人
example: She is a TV addict and watches as much as she can. 她是一个电视迷，看尽可能多的电视。

translation: n. 加，加法；附加部分，增加(物)
example: They built a big addition onto the back of the house. 他们在房子后面加盖了一间大屋子。

translation: adj. 附加的，额外的
example: Additional information can be obtained from the centre. 可以从中心获取更多信息。

translation: v. 演说；从事；忙于；写姓名地址；向…致辞；与…说话；提出；处理；n. 地址；演讲；致辞；说话的技巧；称呼
example: Send a stamped, self-addressed envelope (=  with your address on it so it can be sent back to you  ) . 寄上一个贴好邮票的、写有回邮地址的信封。

translation: adj. 充足的，足够的；适当的，胜任的
example: Farmers have been slow to make adequate provision for their retirement. 农民们迟迟没有为退休做好适当安排。

translation: v. (to)粘着；坚持，遵守；依附，追随
example: All members of the association adhere to a strict code of practice. 所有该协会的成员都遵守严格的业务守则。

translation: adj. 邻近的，毗连的
example: We stayed in adjacent rooms. 我们住在毗连的房间里。

translation: adj. 形容词的；从属的；n. 形容词
example: In “the black cat” the adjective “black”modifies the noun “cat”. 在“那只黑猫”中，形容词“黑的”修饰名词“猫”。

translation: v. 毗连，邻接
example: A vacant plot of land adjoins his house. 有一块空地紧挨着他家。

translation: v. 调整，使…适合；校准
example: Check and adjust the brakes regularly. 经常检查并调节刹车装置。

translation: v. 管理；执行；给予
example: The money will be administered by local charities. 这笔资金将由当地慈善机构管理。

translation: n. 管理；行政；实施；行政机构
example: We’re looking for someone with experience in administration. 我们正在寻找一个有管理经验的人。

translation: v. 钦佩,赞赏,羡慕；称赞,夸奖
example: I really admire the way she brings up those kids all on her own. 我十分佩服她独力把那些孩子抚养大。

translation: n. 承认；入场费；进入许可；坦白；录用
example: Reese, by his own admission , lacks the necessary experience. 里斯自己也承认缺乏必要的经验。

translation: v. 承认；准许进入；可容纳
example: ‘Okay, so maybe I was a little bit scared,’ Jenny admitted. “行了，也许我是有点害怕。”珍妮承认道。

translation: adj. 青春期的；未成熟的；n. 青少年
example: It is important that an adolescent boy should have an adult in whom he can confide. 一个青春期男孩应该有一个他能倾吐心声的成年人，这是很重要的。

translation: v. 采取；接受；收养；正式通过
example: Sally was adopted when she was four. 莎莉四岁时被人收养。

translation: v. 崇拜；爱慕；喜爱；极喜欢；n. (Adore)人名；(法)阿多尔
example: Betty adores her grandchildren. 贝蒂非常宠爱孙辈。

translation: adj. 成年的；成熟的；n. 成年人
example: an adult lion 一头成年的狮子

translation: n. 前进，预付；v. 前进，进展；v. 促进，推进
example: I should warn you in advance that I’m not a very good dancer. 我要先提醒你，我跳舞不是很好。

translation: adj. 先进的；高级的；晚期的；年老的；v. 前进；增加；上涨（advance的过去式和过去分词形式）
example: advanced weapon systems 先进的武器系统

translation: n. 优点，长处，有利条件；利益，好处
example: Younger workers tend to be at an advantage (=  have an advantage  ) when applying for jobs. 年轻点的工人申请工作时往往处于优势地位。

translation: n. (重要事件等的)到来，来临
example: the advent of the computer 计算机的问世

translation: n. 冒险，冒险活动，奇遇；v. 大胆进行
example: a great adventure 一大奇遇

translation: n. 副词；adj. 副词的
example: Will you please compare the adverb “well”? 请你说出副词“well”的原级、比较级和最高级好吗?

translation: adj. 逆的，相反的；敌对的；不利的；有害的
example: They fear it could have an adverse effect on global financial markets. 他们担心这会对全球金融市场产生不利影响。

translation: v. 公告，公布；为...做广告；v. 登广告
example: They no longer advertise alcohol or cigarettes at sporting events. 他们不再在体育赛事上做烟酒广告了。

translation: n. 劝告，忠告，(医生等的)意见
example: You should have followed my advice. 你真该听我的建议。

translation: adj. 可取的，适当的，明智的
example: Regular medical check-ups are advisable. 定期检查身体是明智的。

translation: v. 忠告，劝告，建议；通知，告知
example: She needed someone to advise her. 她需要有个人给她出主意。

translation: n. 辩护者，拥护者，鼓吹者；v. 拥护，提倡
example: Extremists were openly advocating violence. 极端主义者公开鼓吹使用暴力。

translation: adj. 空中的，航空的；空气的；空想的；n. [电讯] 天线
example: Weeks of aerial bombardment had destroyed factories and motorways. 数周的空袭已经摧毁了各工厂和公路。

translation: n. 飞机（等于airplane）
example: The aeroplane landed us at the airport in Barcelona. 飞机把我们降落在巴塞罗那机场。

translation: adj. 美的；美学的；审美的，具有审美趣味的
example: From an esthetic point of view, it’s a nice design. 从美学角度看，这是个不错的设计。

translation: n. 事情；事务；私事；（尤指关系不长久的）风流韵事
example: Are you interested in world affairs? 你对世界大事感兴趣吗？

translation: v. 影响；(疾病)侵袭；感动；n. 情感，感情
example: the areas affected by the hurricane 受飓风影响的地区

translation: n. 爱，喜爱；爱慕之情；感情；疾病，不适
example: She looked back on those days with affection . 她深情地回顾那些日子。

translation: v. 隶属于；n. 附属机构， 分公司
example: He wanted to affiliate with a U.S. firm because he needed expert advice in legal affairs. 他想成为一家美国公司的会员，因为他需要法律事务方面的专家意见。

translation: v. 肯定；断言
example: The general affirmed rumors of an attack. 将军证实了袭击的传闻。

translation: adj. 富裕的；丰富的；流畅的；n. 支流；富人
example: affluent families 富裕的家庭

translation: v. 给予，提供；买得起；n. (Afford)人名；(英)阿福德
example: The room affords a beautiful view over the city. 这房间可以俯瞰城市美景。

translation: adj. 害怕的；恐怕；担心的
example: There’s no need to be afraid. 没有必要害怕。

translation: n. 午后，下午
example: There’s a meeting on Thursday afternoon . 星期四下午有个会议。

translation: adv. 以后，后来
example: Shortly afterward, police arrested four suspects. 之后不久，警方逮捕了４名嫌疑犯。

translation: adv. 后来， 以后
example: Charles arrived shortly afterwards . 过了不多久，查尔斯来了。

translation: n. 代理(处)；代办处；[美](政府的)机关，厅
example: a UN agency responsible for helping refugees 负责为难民提供帮助的联合国机构

translation: n. 议事日程，记事册
example: The Republicans have stuck to their conservative agenda. 共和党人坚持自己的保守议题。

translation: n. 代理人；代理商；产生作用的人或事物
example: Our agent in Rio deals with all our Brazilian business. 我们在里约热内卢的业务代表处理我们在巴西的全部业务。

translation: v. 加重；使恶化；激怒
example: Their money problems were further aggravated by a rise in interest rates. 由于利率上调，他们的财务问题更加严重。

translation: adj. 侵略的，好斗的，有进取心的，敢作敢为的
example: Jim’s voice became aggressive. 吉姆的声音凶了起来。

translation: v. 摇动(液体)；使焦虑不安；困扰；鼓动
example: I must warn you that any mention of Clare agitates your grandmother. 我必须提醒你，一提到克莱尔你奶奶就会不安。

translation: n. (精神或肉体的)极大痛苦，创伤
example: the agony of arthritis 关节炎的剧烈疼痛

translation: v. 同意，赞成；承认；约定，商定
example: Teenagers and their parents rarely agree. 十几岁的孩子跟父母意见很少一致。

translation: adj. 令人愉快的；适合的；和蔼可亲的
example: We spent a most agreeable couple of hours. 我们非常愉快地度过了几个小时。

translation: n. 协议；同意，一致
example: It is easier for two parties to reach agreement than for three. 两方达成一致比三方达成一致容易。

translation: n. 农业；农耕；农业生产；农艺，农学
example: More than 75% of the land is used for agriculture. 75%以上的土地用于农耕。

translation: adj. 向前；在前的；领先；adv. 向前地；领先地；在（某人或某事物的）前面；预先；在将来，为未来
example: He kept his gaze fixed on the car ahead. 他的目光一直盯着前面的那辆汽车。

translation: n. 援助；帮助；助手；帮助者；v. 援助；帮助；有助于
example: Foreign aid from many countries poured into the famine area. 来自许多国家的救援物资纷纷送到饥荒地区。

translation: v. 目的在于；引导；把…对准；n. 目的；目标；对准

translation: n. 同一地区全体居民,社会,社区;共同体
example: The new arts centre will serve the whole community. 这座新的艺术中心将为整个社区服务。

translation: v. （搭乘车、船等）通勤；代偿；n. 通勤（口语）
example: Baldry’s 20-year prison sentence was commuted to three years. 鲍德里二十年的刑期被减至三年。

translation: n. 合同，契约；小粉盒；adj. 紧凑的，紧密的；简洁的；v. 使简洁；使紧密结合
example: The bushes grew in a compact mass. 灌木长成茂密的一片。

translation: n. 同伴,共事者;伴侣
example: For ten years he had been her constant companion . 十年来他一直陪伴她左右。

translation: n. 公司;陪伴;宾客;连(队),(一)群,队,伙
example: Which company do you work for? 你在哪家公司上班？

translation: adj. (with,to)可比较的,比得上的
example: A car of comparable size would cost far more abroad. 同样大小的汽车在国外要贵得多。

translation: adj. 比较的,相当的
example: After a lifetime of poverty, his last few years were spent in comparable comfort. 他穷了一辈子，最后几年还算过得比较舒适。

translation: v. (to，with)比较；(to)把…比作vi.相比
example: The report compares the different types of home computer available. 这份报告比较了市场上不同类型的家用计算机。

translation: n. 比较,对比,比喻,比拟
example: Her paintings invite comparison with those of the early Impressionists (= they remind you of them ) . 她的画作让人想起早期的印象派作品。

translation: n. 卧车包房,隔间;分隔的空间
example: The bag is divided into separate compartments . 这个包有一些独立的隔层。

translation: n. 指南针，罗盘；圆规；v. 包围
example: a map and compass 地图和指南针

translation: n. 同情；怜悯
example: I was shocked by the doctor’s lack of compassion . 我对这个医生如此缺乏同情心感到震惊。

translation: adj. 兼容的；能共处的；可并立的
example: The new software is IBM compatible (= can be used with IBM computers ) . 这个新软件与IBM的计算机兼容。

translation: v. 强迫，迫使；强使发生；n. (Compel)人名；(法)孔佩尔
example: His performance compelled the audience’s attention . 他的表演吸引了观众的注意力。

translation: v. (for)补偿,赔偿
example: Because my left eye is so weak, my right eye has to work harder to compensate. 因为我左眼视力差，右眼就要辛苦点来弥补一下。

translation: n. 补偿(或赔偿)的款物；补偿，赔偿
example: People who are wrongly arrested may be paid compensation . 被误抓的人有可能得到补偿费。

translation: v. 比赛；竞争；对抗
example: He will be competing in the 100-metre race. 他将参加100米比赛。

translation: adj. 有能力的，能胜任的；足够的
example: A competent mechanic should be able to fix the problem. 一名合格的机修工应该能够解决这个问题。

translation: n. 竞争，比赛；角逐，较量；竞争者
example: Going to trade fairs is an ideal opportunity to size up the competition . 参加商品交易会是估量竞争规模的理想机会。

translation: adj. 竞争的；好竞争的；有竞争力的
example: Some US industries are not as competitive as they have been in the past. 美国有些行业不如以前有竞争力了。

translation: v. 编译；编制；编辑；[图情] 汇编
example: The document was compiled by the Department of Health. 这份文件是由卫生部汇编的。

translation: v. 投诉；发牢骚；诉说
example: Residents are complaining because traffic in the area has increased. 由于这个地区的交通流量有所增加，居民都在抱怨。

translation: n. 抱怨；诉苦；疾病；委屈
example: If you wish to make a complaint, you should see the manager. 如果你要投诉，应该去找经理。

translation: n. 补语；余角；补足物；v. 补足，补助
example: The green wallpaper is the perfect complement to the old pine of the dresser. 绿色墙纸是旧松木梳妆台的完美衬托。

translation: adj. 补充的； 辅助的
example: The computer and the human mind have different but complementary abilities. 电脑与人脑各不相同，却又互为补充。

translation: adj. 完整的；完全的；彻底的；v. 完成
example: The police were in complete control of the situation. 警方已完全控制了局势。

translation: adj. 复杂的；合成的， 综合的；n. 综合体
example: a complex system of highways 复杂的公路网

translation: v. 变复杂
example: The situation is complicated by the fact that I’ve got to work late on Friday. 我周五还得加班，这样一来事情更复杂了。

translation: adj. 难懂的，复杂的
example: a complicated voting system 复杂的选举制度

translation: n. 并发症；复杂；复杂化；混乱
example: The fact that the plane was late added a further complication to our journey. 飞机误点给我们的旅行带来了更大的麻烦。

translation: n. 恭维；称赞；问候；致意；道贺；v. 恭维；称赞
example: All the guests paid her extravagant compliments. 所有客人都对她赞不绝口。

translation: v. 遵守；顺从，遵从；答应
example: The newspaper was asked by federal agents for assistance and agreed to comply. 联邦探员要求这家报社给予协助，报社同意配合。

translation: adj. 组成的，构成的；n. 成分；组件；[电子] 元件
example: Gorbachev failed to keep the component parts of the Soviet Union together. 戈尔巴乔夫没能使苏联各组成部分保持在一起。

translation: v. 组成,构成;(of)由…组成;创作(诗歌等)
example: Barrington has composed the music for a new production of ‘A Midsummer Night’s Dream’. 巴林顿为新版的《仲夏夜之梦》谱了曲。

translation: adj. 混合成的，综合成的n.合成物，复合材料
example: The author builds up a useful compo-site picture of contemporary consumer culture. 作者勾勒出了一幅实用的当代消费文化全景图。

translation: n. 作品,作文,乐曲;作曲;结构,组成,成分
example: Some minerals have complex chemical compositions. 有些矿物的化学构成很复杂。

translation: n. [化学] 化合物；混合物；复合词；adj. 复合的；混合的；v. 合成；混合；恶化，加重；和解，妥协
example: man-made organic compounds 人造有机化合物

translation: v. 理解；包含；由…组成
example: She cannot comprehend the extent of the disaster. 她无法理解这场灾难的严重程度。

translation: n. 理解， 领悟
example: Why you let her talk you into doing such a foolish thing is beyond my comprehension (= impossible for me to understand ) . 你怎么会被她说服去做这种蠢事，我实在是无法理解。

translation: adj. 综合的；广泛的；有理解力的；n. 综合学校；专业综合测验
example: We offer our customers a comprehensive range of financial products. 我们为客户提供全面的金融产品。

translation: v. 受压缩小
example: Light silk is best for parachutes, as it compresses well and then expands rapidly. 轻质丝绸最适合制作降落伞，因为这种面料便于压缩，而且展开迅速。

translation: v. 包含，包括，由...组成；构成，组成
example: The house comprises two bedrooms, a kitchen, and a living room. 这座房子有两间卧室、一间厨房和一间起居室。

translation: v. 妥协；危害；n. 妥协，和解；折衷
example: She admitted that she was unable to compromise. 她承认自己无法作出妥协。

translation: adj. 义务的；必修的；被强制的；n. （花样滑冰、竞技体操等的）规定动作
example: the threat of compulsory redundancies 强制性裁员的威胁

translation: v. 计算；估算；用计算机计算；n. 计算；估计；推断
example: Final results had not yet been computed. 最终的结果还未计算出来。

translation: n. 同志；伙伴
example: Comrades, please support this motion. 同志们，请支持这项动议。

translation: v. 隐藏；隐瞒
example: The shadows concealed her as she crept up to the house. 她借着阴影蹑手蹑脚地走向房子。

translation: v. 承认；容许；(比赛结束前)认输；退让
example: ‘That’s the only possible solution.’ ‘Yes, I suppose so,’ Charles conceded. “那是唯一可行的解决办法。”“对，我想是。”查尔斯承认道。

translation: v. (of)设想,构思,想象;以为;怀胎,怀有
example: Scientists first conceived the idea of the atomic bomb in the 1930’s. 在20世纪30年代，科学家第一次有了原子弹的设想。

translation: v. 集中；浓缩；全神贯注；聚集；n. 浓缩，精选；浓缩液
example: Now please concentrate. 现在请集中注意力。

translation: n. 浓度；集中；浓缩；专心；集合
example: She needed all her powers of concentration to stop herself from slipping on the icy road. 她需要集中全部注意力才能不让自己在结冰的路上滑倒。

translation: n. 概念，观念，设想
example: a new concept in business travel 商务旅行的新理念

translation: n. 概念， 观念；设想， 构想
example: the original conception of the book 此书最初的构想

translation: v. 涉及，关系到；使担心；n. 关系；关心；关心的事；忧虑
example: Issues like food additives do concern me. 食品添加剂这类事情确实使我很担心。

translation: prep. 关于；就…而言；v. 涉及；使关心（concern的ing形式）；忧虑
example: calls from young children concerning lost pets 小孩子打来的有关宠物走失的电话

translation: n. 音乐会,演奏会;一齐,一致
example: a rock concert 摇滚音乐会

translation: n. 让步，妥协；特许(权)；
example: The British were not prepared to make any concessions . 英国人没有打算作出让步。

translation: adj. 简明的,简洁的
example: Your summary should be as clear and concise as possible. 你的总结应该尽可能地明白简洁。

translation: v. 结束,终止;断定,下结论;缔结,议定
example: When the investigation is concluded, the results will be sent to the US Attorney’s office. 等到调查结束后，结果会被送到联邦检察官办公室。

translation: n. 结论，推论；结尾；缔结，议定
example: These are the report’s main conclusions. 这些就是这篇报告的主要结论。

translation: adj. 具体的,实质性的n.混凝土v.用混凝土修筑
example: a concrete floor 混凝土地面

translation: v. 谴责；判刑，定罪；声讨
example: Politicians were quick to condemn the bombing. 政治家们立即对爆炸事件进行了谴责。

translation: v. 浓缩；凝结
example: the mist which condensed on every cold surface 每个冰冷的表面上凝结的水汽

translation: n. 条件；情况；环境；身份；v. 决定；使适应；使健康；以…为条件
example: Conditions in the prison were atrocious. 这座监狱的条件糟透了。

translation: n. 行为,品行；v. 引导;管理;指挥(乐队);传导
example: The Senator’s conduct is being investigated by the Ethics Committee. 该参议员的行为正受到道德委员会的调查。

translation: n. 管理者；售票员；领队，指挥；导体
example: Wood is a poor conductor of heat. 木头导热性能差。

translation: v. 授予；给予；n. (Confer)人名；(英)康弗
example: The constitution also confers large powers on Brazil's 25 constituent states. 宪法还授予巴西25个成员州极大的权力。

translation: n. 会议， 讨论会
example: Representatives from over 100 countries attended the International Peace Conference in Geneva. 来自一百多个国家的代表出席了在日内瓦举行的国际和平大会。

translation: v. 承认；坦白；忏悔；供认
example: Occasionally people confess to crimes they haven’t committed just to get attention. 偶尔人们会承认自己并未犯过的罪行，那只是为了引人注意。

translation: n. 信心；信任；秘密；adj. （美）诈骗的；骗得信任的
example: I felt I was doing well and my confidence began to grow. 我觉得自己干得不错，自信心就开始增加了。

translation: adj. 确信的， 自信的
example: Despite her disability, Philippa is very confident. 菲莉帕虽然有残疾，却很自信。

translation: adj. 机密的；表示信任的；获信任的
example: a confidential government report 一份机密的政府报告

translation: v. 限制；使不外出，禁闭n.[pl.]界限，范围
example: Vaughan is confined to a wheelchair . 沃恩离不开轮椅。

translation: v. 确认；确定；证实；批准；使巩固
example: New evidence has confirmed the first witness’s story. 新的证据证实了第一个证人的说法。

translation: n. 冲突，矛盾；斗争；争执；v. 冲突，抵触；争执；战斗
example: the threat of industrial conflict in the coalfields 煤田发生劳资纠纷的风险

translation: v. (to)遵守，适应；相似，一致，符合
example: The lamp has been designed to conform to new safety standards. 该灯设计得符合新的安全标准。

translation: v. 面对；遭遇；比较
example: The problems confronting the new government were enormous. 新政府面临的难题是巨大的。

translation: v. 使混乱,混淆
example: People might well confuse the two products. 人们很容易混淆这两种产品。

translation: n. 困惑，糊涂；混淆；混乱，骚乱
example: To avoid confusion, the teams wore different colours. 为了避免混淆，各队穿着不同颜色的服装。

translation: v. (on)祝贺,向…致贺词
example: He never even stopped to congratulate me. 他甚至没有过来向我祝贺。

translation: n. (on)祝贺,(pl.)祝贺词
example: letters of congratulation 祝贺信

translation: n. (代表)大会;(美国等国的)国会,议会
example: a congress of the ruling Labor Party 执政党工党的代表大会

translation: n. 结合；[语] 连接词；同时发生
example: The worksheets are designed to be used in conjunction with the new course books. 这些活页练习题专门用来与新课本配套使用。

translation: n. 连接；关系；人脉；连接件
example: Police have so far failed to establish a connection between the two murders. 到目前为止警方尚未确定两宗凶杀案之间有关联。

translation: n. 联系， 连接
example: The connexion is not a simple derivation. 这种连接并不只是衍生性的。

translation: v. 战胜，征服；攻克，攻取
example: The Normans conquered England in 1066. 诺曼人于 1066 年征服英格兰。

translation: n. 征服，战胜；战利品
example: the Norman Conquest (= the conquest of England by the Normans ) 诺曼征服

translation: n. 道德心，良心
example: Well, at least I can face them all with a clear conscience (= the knowledge that you have done nothing wrong ) . 好吧，至少我可以问心无愧地面对他们所有人。

translation: adj. 认真的；尽责的；本着良心的；小心谨慎的
example: A conscientious teacher may feel inclined to take work home. 一个认真负责的教师可能会想着把工作带回家去做。

translation: adj. 意识到的；故意的；神志清醒的
example: The driver was still conscious when the ambulance arrived. 救护车赶到时，司机仍然神志清醒。

translation: adj. 连续的；连贯的；顺序的
example: It had rained for four consecutive days. 雨接连下了四天。

translation: n. (意见等的)一致，一致同意，共识
example: The EU Council of Finance Ministers failed to reach a consensus on the pace of integration. 欧盟财政部长会议未能就一体化的进度达成共识。

translation: v&n. (to)同意,赞成,答应
example: The chairman was elected by common consent (= with most people agreeing ) . 主席是大家一致推选出来的。

translation: n. 结果,后果,影响;重要性
example: I don’t suppose it is of any consequence now. 现在我觉得这事一点都无所谓了。

translation: adv. 结果，因此，所以
example: Most computer users have never received any formal keyboard training. Consequently, their keyboard skills are inefficient. 大多数的电脑使用者都没有经过正规的键盘操作训练，因此他们的键盘技巧不够熟练。

translation: n. 保存，保持；保护
example: wildlife conservation 野生生物保护

translation: adj. 保守的；n. 保守派，守旧者
example: a very conservative attitude to education 对待教育非常守旧的态度

translation: v. 考虑，细想；体谅，顾及；认为，把…看作
example: We will have to consider your offer carefully . 我们得仔细考虑你的提议。

translation: adj. 相当大(或多)的,可观的;值得考虑的
example: Michael has already spent considerable time in Barcelona. 迈克尔在巴塞罗那已经待了相当长的时间了。

translation: adj. 考虑周到的,体谅的
example: I think he's the most charming, most considerate man I've ever known. 我觉得他是我所认识的最有魅力、最体贴的男士。

translation: n. 需要考虑的事;考虑,思考;体谅,照顾
example: proposals put forward for consideration 提请考虑的建议

translation: v. (in)在于,存在于;(of)由…组成,由…构成
example: My diet consisted almost exclusively of chocolate-covered cookies and glasses of milk. 我的饮食几乎只包含裹上巧克力的曲奇饼和一杯杯牛奶。

translation: adj. (in)前后一致的；（with）一致，符合
example: The evidence is not consistent. 证词前后不一致。

translation: n. 控制台，仪表板；落地柜；v. 安慰，慰问
example: No one could console her when Peter died. 彼得去世时没人能够安慰她。

translation: v. 使加固，使加强；(把)联为一体，合并
example: The company has consolidated its position as the country’s leading gas supplier. 这家公司巩固了作为该国主要煤气供应商的地位。

translation: adj. 显眼的,明显的
example: The notice must be displayed in a conspicuous place. 通告一定要贴在显眼的地方。

translation: n. 阴谋，密谋，共谋
example: There were many conspiracy theories (= beliefs that something is the result of a conspiracy ) surrounding Princess Diana’s death. 围绕戴安娜王妃之死有许多阴谋论。

translation: adj. 不变的；恒定的；经常的；n. [数] 常数；恒量
example: There was a constant stream of visitors to the house. 参观这幢房子的游客川流不息。

translation: n. 成分；选民；委托人；adj. 构成的；选举的
example: He told his constituents that he would continue to represent them to the best of his ability. 他告诉他的选民们他会继续竭尽所能代表他们。

translation: v. 组成，构成；建立；任命
example: We must redefine what constitutes a family. 我们必须对家庭的构成重新定义。

translation: n. 宪法；体制；章程；构造；建立，组成；体格
example: The right to speak freely is written into the Constitution of the United States. 言论自由的权利被写入美国宪法。

translation: v. 驱使；强迫；束缚
example: Poor soil has constrained the level of crop production. 贫瘠的土地限制了农作物的产量。

translation: v. 建造，构造；创立；n. 构想，概念
example: There are plans to construct a new road bridge across the river. 有计划要建造一条新的跨河公路桥。

translation: n. 建设；建筑物；解释；造句
example: a road construction project 道路修建计划

translation: v. 请教，向...咨询，找...商量；查阅，查看
example: If symptoms persist, consult a doctor without delay. 如果症状持续的话，马上咨询医生。

translation: n. 会诊医师,顾问医生;顾问
example: a management consultant 管理顾问

translation: v. 消耗；吃完，喝光；(with)使着迷；烧毁
example: Only 27% of the paper we consume is recycled. 我们消耗的纸张只有 27% 得到回收利用。

translation: n. 消费(量),消耗
example: Vigorous exercise increases oxygen consumption. 剧烈运动增加氧的消耗。

translation: v&n. (使)接触,联系,交往
example: The town is cut off from contact with the outside world. 小镇与外界的联系被切断了。

translation: adj. 传染性的， 会蔓延的
example: The patient is still highly contagious. 这个病人仍然有很强的传染性。

translation: v. 包含，容纳；容忍，抑制；可被...除尽
example: The thieves stole a purse containing bank-notes. 小偷们偷到了一个里面有钞票的钱包。

translation: n. 容器;集装箱
example: ice cream in plastic containers 塑料容器里的冰激凌

translation: v. 污染，弄脏
example: Drinking water supplies are believed to have been contaminated. 据信饮用水已受到污染。

translation: v. 盘算，计议；周密考虑；注视，凝视
example: He had even contemplated suicide. 他甚至想过自杀。

translation: adj. 现代的,当代的;同时代的 time

translation: n. 马力（功率单位）

translation: n. 软管；长筒袜；男性穿的紧身裤；v. 用软管浇水；痛打
example: Water in the engine compartment is sucked away by a hose. 发动机舱里的水由一条软管吸走。

translation: n. 医院
example: They are building a new hospital. 他们正在建一家新医院。

translation: n. 好客；殷勤
example: Thanks for your hospitality over the past few weeks. 感谢你几周来的热情款待。

translation: n. [计] 主机；主人；主持人；许多；v. 主持；当主人招待
example: Our host greeted us at the door. 主人在门口迎接我们。

translation: n. 人质；抵押品
example: The group are holding two tourists hostage (= keeping them as hostages ) . 这伙人挟持了两名游客作为人质。

translation: n. 女主人，女老板；女服务员；舞女；女房东
example: The hostess introduced them. 女主人介绍了他们。

translation: adj. 敌对的，敌方的；怀敌意的；n. 敌对
example: Southampton fans gave their former coach a hostile reception . 南安普敦队的球迷对球队的前任教练很不友善。

translation: adj. 热的；辣的；热情的；激动的；紧迫的；adv. 热；紧迫地；v. 变热；n. (Hot)人名；(塞)霍特；(法)奥特
example: a hot curry 一种辛辣的咖喱

translation: n. 旅馆，饭店；客栈；vt. 使…在饭店下榻；vi. 进行旅馆式办公
example: I’ve booked the flights and the hotel. 我已订好机票和酒店。

translation: v. 追猎；烦扰；激励；n. 猎犬；卑劣的人
example: After the court case, Lee was hounded relentlessly by the press. 案件审结后，李不断受到新闻界的骚扰。

translation: adj. 家庭的；日常的；王室的；n. 全家人，一家人；(包括佣工在内的)家庭，户
example: household chores 家务杂活

translation: n. 家庭主妇
example: Married at nineteen, she was a traditional housewife and mother of four children. 她19岁就结婚了，是个传统的家庭主妇和4个孩子的母亲。

translation: n. 家务事
example: Men are doing more housework nowadays. 现今男人正在承担越来越多的家务。

translation: n. 房屋；住房供给；[机] 外壳；遮盖物；机器等的防护外壳或外罩
example: government housing policy 政府的住房政策

translation: v. 盘旋，翱翔；徘徊；n. 徘徊；盘旋；犹豫
example: Her younger brother hovered in the background watching us. 她的弟弟在后面走来走去，观察着我们。

translation: v. 咆哮；怒吼；狂吠；n. 嗥叫；怒号；嚎哭
example: Upstairs, one of the twins began to howl (= cry ) . 楼上，双胞胎中的一个开始大哭起来。

translation: v. 把挤在一起；使缩成一团；草率了事；n. 拥挤；混乱；杂乱一团
example: We lay huddled together for warmth. 我们紧紧挤在一起取暖。

translation: v. 拥抱；紧抱；抱有，坚持；n. 拥抱；紧抱；固执
example: We stood there crying and hugging each other. 我们站在那里哭着互相拥抱。

translation: adj. 巨大的；庞大的；无限的；n. (Huge)人名；(英)休奇
example: a huge dog 一条大狗

translation: v. 发低哼声；n. 嗡嗡声；哼声；杂声；int. 哼；嗯
example: He began to hum a tune. 他开始哼唱一支曲子。

translation: adj. 人的,人类的；n. 人
example: There are many different cell types in the human body . 人体中有许多种不同的细胞类型。

translation: n. 人类,人性,人情;(pl.)人文科学
example: We want a clean healthy environment for all humanity . 我们希望全人类拥有一个干净健康的生存环境。

translation: adj. 谦逊的；简陋的；（级别或地位）低下的；不大的；v. 使谦恭；轻松打败（尤指强大的对手）；低声下气
example: a modest and humble man 一个谦卑的男人

translation: adj. 湿的,湿气重的
example: Tokyo is extremely humid in mid-summer. 仲夏的东京十分潮湿。

translation: n. 湿气,湿度
example: The room is kept at 72 degrees and 50% relative humidity. 房间的温度保持在72度，相对湿度50%。

translation: v. 羞辱；使…丢脸；耻辱
example: Her boss humiliated her in front of all her colleagues. 她的老板在所有同事面前羞辱了她。

translation: n. 幽默，诙谐；心情；v. 迎合，迁就；顺应
adj. 幽默的， 诙谐的
example: humorous stories 诙谐的故事

translation: n. 幽默， 诙谐
example: his humour and charm 他的幽默感和魅力

translation: n. 饿，饥饿；渴望；v. 渴望；挨饿
example: Try to satisfy your hunger by eating some fruit. 吃些水果充充饥吧。

translation: v. 打猎； 猎取；搜索； 寻找；n. 打猎， 猎取；搜索； 寻找
example: the slopes where I hunted deer as a kid 我儿时猎鹿的山坡

translation: v. 丢下；用力投掷；愤慨地说出；n. 用力的投掷
example: Demonstrators were hurling bricks through the windows. 示威者在向窗里掷砖块。

translation: n. 飓风，暴风
example: The hurricane devastated a large section of the coast. 飓风毁坏了沿海地区的大部分。

translation: n. 匆忙，急忙；v. 仓促（做某事）；催促；（朝某方向）迅速移动；迅速处理
example: Sorry, I can’t stop, I’m in a hurry. 对不起，我不能停下，我赶时间。

translation: n. 丈夫
example: Have you met my husband Roy? 你见过我的丈夫罗伊吗？

translation: n. 小屋；临时营房；vt. 使住在小屋中；驻扎；vi. 住在小屋中；驻扎
example: a wooden hut 小木屋

translation: n. [化学] 氢
example: Water contains hydrogen and oxygen. 水含有氢和氧。

translation: n. 卫生
example: the importance of personal hygiene 个人卫生的重要性

translation: n. 虚伪；伪善
example: It would be sheer hypocrisy to pray for success, since I’ve never believed in God. 我从不相信上帝，因此为获成功而祈祷是纯粹的虚伪之举。

translation: n. 假设
example: One hypothesis is that the victim fell asleep while driving. 一种假设是受害人开车时睡着了。

translation: adj. 歇斯底里的；异常兴奋的
example: Janet became hysterical and began screaming. 珍妮特歇斯底里起来，开始尖叫。

translation: adj. 理想的；完美的；想象的；不切实际的；n. 理想；典范
example: advice on how to reach your ideal weight 如何达到理想体重的建议

translation: adj. 同一的；完全相同的；n. 完全相同的事物
example: four identical houses 四幢一模一样的房子

translation: n. 识别,鉴别;证件;认同
example: His body was taken to Brighton mortuary for identification. 他的尸体被送到布赖顿停尸所确认身份。

translation: v. 识别,鉴别;(with)把…和…看成一样
example: He was too far away to be able to identify faces. 他离得太远，没法看面孔认出谁是谁。

translation: n. 身份；同一性，一致；特性；恒等式
example: The identity of the killer is still unknown. 凶手的身份仍未查明。

translation: n. 意识形态，(政治或社会的)思想意识
example: the ideologies of fascism and terrorism 法西斯主义和恐怖主义的意识形态

translation: n. 成语，习语；土话
example: the new musical idiom 新的音乐风格

translation: n. 笨蛋，傻瓜；白痴
example: It was all your fault, you idiot. 全是你的错，你这笨蛋。

translation: adj. 空闲的， 闲置的；无用的， 无效的；懒散的；vt. 浪费， 虚度
example: I cannot afford to leave the land lying idle. 我不能让土地闲置。

translation: v. 点燃；使燃烧；使激动
example: The petrol tank suddenly ignited. 油箱突然着火了。

translation: n. 无知，愚昧；不知，不懂
example: Excuse my ignorance, but how does it actually work? 请原谅我的无知，它究竟是如何运作的？

translation: adj. 无知的；愚昧的
example: an ignorant and uneducated man 不学无术的人

translation: v. 驳回诉讼；忽视；不理睬
example: You can’t ignore the fact that many criminals never go to prison. 你不能无视很多罪犯从未获刑的事实。

translation: adj. [法] 非法的；违法的；违反规则的；n. 非法移民，非法劳工
example: illegal drugs 违禁药品

translation: adj. 文盲的；不识字的；没受教育的；n. 文盲
example: It was an illiterate letter, full of mistakes. 这封信文笔拙劣，错误连篇。

translation: n. 病；疾病
example: She had all the normal childhood illnesses. 儿童的常见病她小时候都得过。

translation: v. 照亮，照明；用灯光装饰；说明，阐释
example: A single candle illuminated his face. 一支蜡烛照亮了他的脸。

translation: n. 幻想，错误的观念；错觉，幻觉，假象
example: She was under no illusion that he loved her. 她不再幻想他爱她了。

translation: v. 举例说明,阐明;图解,加插图
example: Let me give an example to illustrate the point. 让我举个例子来说明这一点。

translation: n. 说明；例证，插图；举例说明
example: The book contains 62 pages of illustrations. 这本书有62页插图。

translation: n. 影像；想象；肖像；偶像；v. 想象；反映；象征；作…的像
example: She peered closely at her image in the mirror. 她仔细检视镜子中自己的映像。

translation: adj. 虚构的，假想的；想像的；虚数的
example: As she listened, she played an imaginary piano on her knees. 她边听边在膝盖上作弹钢琴状。

translation: n. [心理] 想象力；空想；幻想物
example: a storyteller with an incredible imagination 想象力极丰富的讲故事者

translation: adj. 富于想象的；有创造力的
example: an imaginative use of computer technology 计算机技术的妙用

translation: v. 想像；猜想；臆断
example: Perhaps she’d never really been there at all – perhaps she’d just imagined it. 可能她从未到过那儿——也许这都是她的幻想。

translation: v. 模仿，仿效；仿造，仿制
example: She was a splendid mimic and loved to imitate Winston Churchill. 她是个出色的模仿者，喜欢模仿温斯顿·丘吉尔。

translation: n. 模仿，仿造；仿制品；adj. 人造的，仿制的
example: The remake of ‘Casablanca’ was a pale imitation (= something that is much less good than the thing it imitates ) of the original movie. 重拍的《卡萨布兰卡》远不如原版。

translation: adj. 立即的,即时的;直接的,最接近的
example: Our immediate response to the attack was sheer horror. 我们对攻击的第一反应就是非常惊恐。

translation: adj. 巨大的，广大的；无边无际的；非常好的
example: People who travel by rail still read an immense amount. 人们坐火车旅行时仍然会读很多书。

translation: v. 使沉浸在;使浸没
example: The electrodes are immersed in liquid. 电极被浸没在液体中。

translation: adj. 移民的；迁入的；n. 移民，侨民
example: But “the hostile part can be mobilized from time to time,” by what he calls “anti-immigrant entrepreneurs. 但是“敌对的那部分可能会不时地动员”，以他称之为“反移民企业家”的名义。

translation: adj. 免疫的,有免疫力的;有受影响的;豁免的
example: Once we’ve had the disease, we’re immune for life. 我们一旦得过这种病，就获得了终身免疫力。

translation: n. 冲击， 碰撞；效果； 影响
example: The force of the impact knocked the breath out of her. 撞击力使她喘不过气来。

translation: v. 损害；削弱；减少
example: The illness had impaired his ability to think and concentrate. 这种疾病损害了他的思维能力和注意力。

translation: v. 传授，给予；告知，通知
example: She had information that she couldn’t wait to impart. 她得到了消息，迫不及待地想告诉别人。

translation: adj. 不耐烦的， 急躁的
example: He turned away with an impatient gesture. 他做了个不耐烦的手势转过身去。

translation: adj. 必要的，不可避免的；紧急的；命令的，专横的；势在必行的；[语]祈使的；n. 必要的事；命令；需要；规则；[语]祈使语气
example: It is imperative that politicians should be good communicators. 政治家应该是很好的沟通者，这很重要。

translation: adj. 帝国的；皇帝的；至高无上的；威严的；n. 纸张尺寸；特等品
example: Britain’s imperial expansion in the 19th century 19世纪英帝国的扩张

translation: n. 推动(力),促进
example: The discovery gave fresh impetus to the research. 这个发现为研究带来新动力。

translation: v. 实施，执行；实现，使生效；n. 工具，器具；手段
example: The government promised to implement a new system to control financial loan institutions. 政府许诺要实施新的制度来控制金融贷款机构。

translation: n. 含义；暗示；牵连，卷入；可能的结果，影响
example: This election has profound implications for the future of U.S. democracy. 对于美国民主的未来而言，这次选举影响深远。

translation: adj. 含蓄的；暗示的；盲从的
example: ...an implicit warning to the Moroccans not to continue or repeat the military actions they began a week ago. …叫摩洛哥人不要继续或重复一周前开始的军事行动的含蓄警告。

translation: v. 意味；暗示；隐含
example: an implied threat 隐含的威胁

translation: v&n. 进口,输入,(pl.)进口商品;要旨,含意
n. 重要,重要性
example: He was full of his own importance (= he behaved in an annoying way which showed that he thought he was very important ). 他自以为很了不起。

translation: adj. 重要的,重大的;有地位的,有权力的
example: a very important meeting 很重要的会议

translation: v. 征(税);(on)把…强加给
example: Parents should beware of imposing their own tastes on their children. 父母应该提防把自己的兴趣强加给孩子。

translation: adj. 不可能的；难以忍受的，很难对付的
example: ‘I want to speak to Mr Franks.’ ‘I’m afraid that’s impossible.’ “我想和弗兰克斯先生谈谈。”“恐怕不行。”

translation: v. 盖印；强征；传送；给予某人深刻印象；n. 印象，印记；特征，痕迹
example: Steve borrowed his dad’s sports car to impress his girlfriend. 史蒂夫借来他爸爸的跑车向女友炫耀。

translation: n. 印象；效果，影响；压痕，印记；感想；曝光（衡量广告被显示的次数。打开一个带有该广告的网页，则该广告的impression 次数增加一次）
example: When we looked around the school we got a very good impression. 我们参观了学校，对它的印象很好。

translation: adj. 感人的；令人钦佩的；给人以深刻印象的
example: The figures certainly look impressive. 这些数字看上去确实很可观。

translation: v. 改善,改进,增进;好转,进步
example: a course for students wishing to improve their English 为想提高英语水平的学生开设的一门课

translation: n. 改进,进步,增进;改进措施
example: Our results have shown some improvement this month. 我们的成绩这个月有所提高。

translation: n. 冲动；[电子] 脉冲；刺激；神经冲动；推动力；vt. 推动
example: The eye converts light signals to nerve impulses. 眼睛把光信号转变成神经冲动。

translation: vt. 开始， 开展；为…举行就职典礼， 使正式就任；为…举行开幕式， 为…举行落成仪式
example: The Turner Prize was inaugurated in 1984. 特纳奖于1984年正式设立。

translation: n. 动机；刺激；adj. 激励的；刺激的
example: As an added incentive, there’s a bottle of champagne for the best team. 给最优秀的队发一瓶香槟作为额外的鼓励。

translation: n. 英寸；身高；少许；v. 使缓慢地移动
example: The curtains were an inch too short. 窗帘短了一英寸。

translation: n. 影响程度，影响范围；发生率
example: The incidence of breast cancer increases with age. 乳腺癌的发病率随着年龄的增长而上升。

translation: n. 事件,事变
example: Am I at risk because of some incident in my sexual past? 我过去性生活中的某件事会使我处于危险境地吗？

translation: adv. 附带地,顺便提及
example: Incidentally, where were you born? 顺便问一下，你在哪儿出生的？

translation: v. 倾斜；倾向；易于；n. 倾斜；斜面；斜坡
example: The telescope is inclined at an angle of 43 degrees. 这架望远镜以43度角倾斜。

translation: v. 包括,包含,计入
example: Does the price include postage? 这个价格包含邮费吗？

translation: adj. (of)包括的,包含的;范围广的
example: Not everyone shares his vision of an inclusive America. 不是所有人都同意他的观点，认为美国是个包容性很强的国家。

translation: v. 合并,纳入,结合；adj. 合并的
example: The agreement would allow the rebels to be incorporated into a new national police force. 该协议将允许叛军并入一支新的国家警察部队。

translation: v&n. 增加,增长,增进
example: The population increased dramatically in the first half of the century. 该世纪上半叶，人口大幅度增加。

translation: adv. 不断增加地,日益
example: Marketing techniques are becoming increasingly sophisticated. 市场营销技巧越来越巧妙。

translation: adj. 难以置信的，惊人的
example: It’s incredible that he survived the fall. 他跌下去竟然能够生还，真不可思议。

translation: v. 招致,惹起,遭受
example: The government had also incurred huge debts. 政府也已承受了大笔债务。

translation: n. 独立， 自主
example: The country has made great advances since independence. 该国自独立以来发展迅速。

translation: adj. 独立的， 自主的
example: There are plans to split the corporation into a number of smaller independent companies. 有计划要把这家大企业分割成一些独立的小公司。

translation: n. 指标；指数；索引；指针；v. 做索引
example: ...the consumer price index. …消费价格指数。

translation: v. 指出,指示;表明,暗示
example: The study indicates a connection between poverty and crime. 研究显示贫穷和犯罪有关联。

translation: n. 指出,指示;表明,暗示
adj. (of)指示的,暗示的
example: His action is indicative of growing concern about the shortage of skilled labour. 他的行为显示对于熟练工人短缺现象的日益关注。

translation: adj. 漠不关心的；无关紧要的；中性的，中立的
example: an indifferent cook 手艺平平的厨师

translation: adj. 愤慨的,愤慨不平的
example: an indignant reply 愤慨的回复

translation: n. 愤怒,愤慨
example: To his indignation, Charles found that his name was not on the list. 查尔斯发现他的名字没有出现在名单上，这让他深感愤慨。

translation: adj. (to,for)必不可少的,必需的
example: Mobile phones have become an indispensable part of our lives. 移动电话已经成为我们生活中的必需品。

translation: adj. 个人的,单独的;独特的；n. 个人,个体
example: Each individual leaf on the tree is different. 树上每片叶子都不相同。

translation: adj. 室内的，户内的
example: an indoor swimming pool 室内游泳池

translation: v. 引诱,劝使;引起,导致;感应
example: Patients with eating disorders may use drugs to induce vomiting. 患有进食障碍的人可使用药物催吐。

translation: v. 满足；纵容；使高兴；使沉迷于…
example: His mother spoiled him, indulging his every whim. 他母亲对他纵容娇惯，百依百顺。

translation: adj. 工业的； 产业的
example: By 1900, Britain was a mainly industrial society. 到1900年英国已基本进入工业社会。

translation: vt. 使工业化
example: The way to bring cost down is to industrialise much of the process. 降低成本的方法是将这个过程的大部分工业化。

translation: v. 使工业化
example: Energy consumption rises as countries industrialize. 能源消耗随着各国工业化而增加。

translation: v. 传染，感染；影响(思想等)

translation: n. 熨斗；烙铁；坚强；v. 熨；用铁铸成；adj. 铁的；残酷的；刚强的

translation: v. 反映；反射，照出；表达；显示;反省

translation: n. 反射；沉思；映象
example: Can you see your reflection in the glass? 你能看到玻璃里你的影像吗？

translation: n. 映像， 倒影；反省， 沉思
v&n. 改革,改造,改良
example: plans to radically reform the tax system 彻底改革税收制度的计划

translation: v. 节制，克制；避免；制止；n. 叠句，副歌；重复

translation: v. 更新；使……恢复；使……清新；消除……的疲劳

translation: n. 点心；起提神作用的东西；精力恢复

translation: n. 避难；避难所；庇护；vt. 给予…庇护；接纳…避难；vi. 避难；逃避

translation: n. 难民，避难者；流亡者，逃亡者

translation: n. 拒绝,回绝

translation: v. 拒绝,谢绝；n. 废物,垃圾

translation: prep. 关于，至于

translation: adj. 不管的；不顾的；不注意的；adv. 不顾后果地；不管怎样，无论如何；不惜费用地

translation: n. 地区；范围；部位

translation: v. 登记；注册；记录；挂号邮寄；把…挂号；正式提出；n. 登记；注册；记录；寄存器；登记簿
example: The tanker is registered in Rotterdam. 这艘油轮是在鹿特丹登记的。

translation: adj. 定期的；有规律的；合格的；整齐的；普通的；n. 常客；正式队员；中坚分子；adv. 定期地；经常地
example: The company holds regular meetings with employees. 公司定期召集雇员开会。

translation: v. 调节，规定；控制；校准；有系统的管理

translation: v. 高兴；庆祝

translation: adj. 作为结果而发生的;合成的
n. 简历
